title: Gireoudia sericoneura
taxonomy: Gireoudia sericoneura is a species of moth in the family Erebidae. The classification of this species is within the genus Gireoudia, which falls under the order Lepidoptera. Lepidoptera is a large order of insects, and Erebidae is a family within it. The exact classification may also involve other taxonomic ranks such as family, subfamily, or tribe. Further research may be necessary to determine the exact classification of Gireoudia sericoneura.
